package rulecoverage

func PositiveGiantModelStructSpansMultipleSubdomains() string {
    ruleID := "giant_model_struct_spans_multiple_subdomains"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Oversized model structs that appear to merge multiple bounded contexts into one persistence shape."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
